release_notes: All phone units were consolidated into **Devices → Phones** and the standalone **Phones tab has been removed**. Every phone (290 units) was migrated and verified as an exact copy — units, status, prices and details all match — before the tab was retired. Scanning a phone's IMEI still works: it now opens the phone from Devices.; The old phone database is **kept as a backup** (nothing deleted); the app simply no longer shows the separate tab, so all phones are managed in one place going forward and can't drift between two lists again.
